summary: Update an estimate line item of the proposal

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description: Unique company identifier associated with the Procore User Account.

schema.description: Line item update payload. Only provided fields will be updated; omit fields to leave unchanged.

name.description: Display name of the line item.

cost_item.description: Cost item fields to update. Only provided fields will be updated. Omit to leave unchanged. If the line item has no existing cost item, a new one will be created. Cost item cannot be removed.

id.description: Catalog or cost item ID. Use empty string or "-1" for new custom items.

type.description: Cost item category. Allowed: Part, Assembly, Custom, Equipment, Subcontractor, Travel, Labor.

based_on_item_id.description: ID of the catalog item this cost item is based on.

name.description: Display name of the cost item.

unit_labor.description: Labor time per unit, in the unit specified by labor_time_unit.

labor_time_unit.description: Unit for labor time. Allowed: Minutes, Hours, Days, Weeks, Months.

is_untaxed.description: Whether the item is excluded from tax.

unit.description: Unit of measurement. Allowed: Ea, Ft, SqFt, CuFt, Gal, Lb, Yd, SqYd, CuYd, Square, None, Minutes, Hours, Days, Ton, Weeks, Months.

symbol_id.description: Symbol ID for takeoff. Built-in: circle, square, empty. Custom: numeric document ID string.

labor_factor.description: Labor difficulty factor applied to the cost item.

tag.description: Optional tag for filtering or grouping.
